posts.author: ElaraVine73
posts.text: URGENT: Official support team noticed suspicious login from a different device! To secure your account immediately, please verify at [link removed] and enter your current password and 2FA code. We cannot process this without it.
posts.explanation: This post directly requests sensitive credentials and security codes to access an account, which constitutes a clear credential-harvesting fraud attempt requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
